---
title: "security_scan.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\.agents\scripts\security_scan.py"
loc: 91
complexity: 15
logic_score: 1.02
style_score: 3.98
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 1.00
---

## Intent
The `security_scan.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_bottom, SecurityScanner, __init__, scan, report. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_bottom, SecurityScanner, __init__, scan, report. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [sv_engine](file://sv_engine)

### Exports
- `SovereignHUD`
- `box_top`
- `box_row`
- `box_bottom`
- `SecurityScanner`
- `__init__`
- `scan`
- `report`
